QueryEipList.ipVersion: IP version to query, supports ipv4 and ipv6, defaults to ipv4.
QueryEipList.eip: EIP address to query, including IPv4 and IPv6 EIPs; to query a specific IPv6 EIP, ipVersion must be set to ipv6.
QueryEipList.instanceType: Bound instance type. Valid values: BCC, BBC, DCC, ENI, BLB, NAT, VPN.
QueryEipList.instanceId: Short ID of the bound instance; if specified, instanceType must also be provided.
QueryEipList.name: Name of the EIP to query.
QueryEipList.status: Instance status; only supports querying three statuses: available, binded, paused.
QueryEipList.eipIds: EIP short ID(s); supports single or multiple EIP IDs (multiple IDs separated by commas).
QueryEipList.marker: Starting position for paginated list queries, a system-generated string.
QueryEipList.maxKeys: Maximum number of entries per page, up to 1000. Default is 1000.
